emails.subject: Mojave index
emails.body: Would you please e-mail me the Mojave indexes for Nov, Dec, Jan, and Feb thanks

emails.subject: RE: Mojave index
emails.body: RE: Mojave index Nov 2.92, Dec 2.56, Jan 2.67...I will get Feb. To: Lokay, Michelle

emails.subject: RE: Mojave index
emails.body: thanks I would like to go ahead and input Feb into the system so that the imbalance will be valued at the correct price if you are able to get the index within a couple of days that would be great To: Hanagriff, Richard

emails.subject: FW: Mojave index
emails.body: FW: Mojave index The February 2002 El Paso Topock point price was $1.8600. To: Hanagriff, Richard

emails.subject: FW: Mojave index
emails.body: February 2002 price $2.07 March 2002 price $2.30 February was revised and March is now posted. To: Hanagriff, Richard
